positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic forest scene. Intricate bioluminescent trees with abstract, glowing branches reaching upwards. The ground is covered in swirling nebulous patterns and crystal flora. Deep indigo and vibrant teal gradients dominate the color palette, contrasted by sharp, electric magenta accents. The composition features a central, balanced cluster of glowing life forms, designed for a striking print on fabric. Clean silhouettes, strong backlighting creating dramatic depth, high contrast, vector illustration quality, smooth geometric forms, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, worst quality, grain, noise, messy composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, deep focus
